hooks.command: bash -c 'if command -v parse_sdrf >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "sdrf-skills loaded — parse_sdrf available."; else echo "SDRF skills loaded. Install dependencies for full functionality:"; echo "  conda: conda env create -f environment.yml && conda activate sdrf-skills"; echo "  pip:   pip install -r requirements.txt"; echo "Run /sdrf:setup for guided installation."; fi'
